/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -ffast-math CMakeFiles/test_mth_3node_temporal_performance.dir/tests/test_mth_3node_temporal_performance.cc.o -o test_mth_3node_temporal_performance  libcedar.a -llz4 -lgRPC::grpc++ -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lyaml-cpp::yaml-cpp third_party/braft/output/lib/libbraft.a /usr/local/lib/libbrpc.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libleveldb.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl -lz -lrt
